description: Source code for an extraction service that processes uploaded files (PDF, DOCX, TXT, DOC) to extract text, supporting optional dependencies and handling various formats.

methods.name: _decodeToText
methods.description: Decodes a buffer to UTF-8 text, or converts other input to string.

methods.name: _normalizeNewlines
methods.description: Normalizes newline characters in text to Unix style.

methods.name: extractTextFromUploadedFile
methods.description: Main function to extract text from uploaded file buffers based on mime type and filename.
